channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Delhi Hospital Successfully Treats 17-Year-Old Girl with Advanced Ewing's Sarcoma Through Multidisciplinary ICU Care and Chemotherapy
item.description: Doctors at Fortis Hospital Shalimar Bagh in Delhi have achieved a remarkable success by saving a 17-year-old girl who was battling Stage 3 Ewing's sarcoma, a rare and aggressive form of bone cancer. T...

item.title: Philippines’ First Single-Port Robotic Surgical System Unveiled at Chinese General Hospital
item.description: The Chinese General Hospital and Medical Center (CGHMC) in Manila officially launched the Philippines’ first single-port robotic surgical system on Tuesday. The Toumai Endoscopic Single-Port Robotic S...

item.title: China affirms support for Pakistan’s mediation role in US-Iran conflict
item.description: The Pakistani Foreign Office clarified on Thursday that certain media outlets misrepresented the recent call between Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi and Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ish...

item.title: Lafarge Africa launches free breast cancer screening for women in Lagos to boost early detection
item.description: Lafarge Africa don show say e no dey talk only, na action dem dey take for women empowerment. To celebrate International Women’s Day 2026, dem join hand with Leadway Health arrange free breast cancer ...

item.title: Lopez family majority retracts decision to remove Piki Lopez as CEO
item.description: The majority faction of the Lopez family, which controls 71% of Lopez Inc., has officially withdrawn its February resolution to remove Federico 'Piki' Lopez as president and CEO. This move occurred du...

item.title: By-Elections Underway in Emurua Dikirr, Porro and Endo as Political Camps Test Support
item.description: Voting is happening today in three key areas – Emurua Dikirr in Narok County, Porro in Samburu County, and Endo in Elgeyo Marakwet County. These by-elections are drawing national attention because the...

item.title: Peter Obi Promises to Serve Only One Term as President if Elected in 2027
item.description: Former Labour Party presidential candidate wey come third for 2023 election, Peter Obi, don talk say if Nigerians elect am for 2027, e go serve only one term of four years. The man talk this one on Ne...

item.title: Practical tips for staying composed as an entrepreneur
item.description: Lindokuhle Madlingozi, an ASMR creator and entrepreneur, emphasises the importance of mindfulness and preparation in navigating the unpredictable world of entrepreneurship. According to Madlingozi, st...

item.title: David Byrne in the 1970s: Early Career and Artistic Vision
item.description: David Byrne in the 1970s emerged as an eccentric and innovative frontman of the band Talking Heads, shaping the New York new wave and punk scene. Born in 1952, Byrne was in his early-to-mid 20s during...

item.title: Former DOJ Official Accuses Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche of Delaying Indictments for Personal Gain
item.description: Jonathan Gross, a former political appointee in the Department of Justice (DOJ), has publicly accused Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche of deliberately delaying high-profile indictments while Pam B...

item.title: Jackie Chan: Mastery of Kung Fu and Martial Arts Techniques
item.description: Jackie Chan, born Chan Kong-sang on April 7, 1954, in Hong Kong, is celebrated worldwide as an actor, martial artist, and filmmaker. Known for his unique blend of slapstick comedy, acrobatic fighting,...

item.title: Ozzy and Sharon Osbourne Biopic Confirmed for 2028 Release
item.description: Jack Osbourne has confirmed that a biographical film about his parents, rock icon Ozzy Osbourne and his wife-manager Sharon, is firmly in development and expected to be released in 2028. Initially ann...

item.title: Femi Otedola Increases Stake In FirstHoldCo To 19.36%
item.description: Femi Otedola, the billionaire chairman of First HoldCo Plc, don buy more shares of the company worth about N43.41 billion on May 13, 2026. This move make him own total of 8.6 billion shares, wey now r...

item.title: Brookfield Considers Restarting V.C. Summer Nuclear Plant in South Carolina
item.description: Brookfield Asset Management has been selected by Santee Cooper to take over and potentially complete the unfinished Units 2 and 3 at the Virgil C. Summer Nuclear Station in South Carolina, a project t...

item.title: Marco Rubio enters China via transliteration loophole despite previous sanctions
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio accompanied President Donald Trump on a state visit to China in 2026, despite being banned from the country under sanctions imposed in 2020 due to his criticism of Beiji...

item.title: European Defence Expansion Raises Political and Strategic Challenges
item.description: In the wake of Russia’s 2022 invasion of Ukraine and uncertainties surrounding the second Trump administration, Europe has accelerated its military build-up, emphasising the need for strategic autonom...

item.title: Tanzania Plans to Revive Petroleum Exploration and Attract New Investments
item.description: The Ministry of Energy in Tanzania, under the guidance of Permanent Secretary Dr. James Mataragio, is taking steps to revitalize petroleum exploration in the country. During a meeting with the Petrole...

item.title: Ontario Sees Sharp Increase in Ineligible OSAP Payments, but Fraud Remains Low
item.description: The Ontario Student Assistance Program (OSAP) has experienced a significant rise in cases where students received funds ineligible due to misrepresentation, according to documents obtained by Global N...

item.title: Ontario Premier Faces Criticism Over $200K in Additional Private Jet Expenses
item.description: Ontario Premier Doug Ford is facing criticism from political opponents and advocacy groups after it was revealed that taxpayers covered nearly $200,000 in extra costs associated with a brief ownership...

item.title: Pakistan Clarifies Nature of Chinese FM’s Call on Iran Mediation
